title: Feedback
subtitle: Learn how to give constructive feedback that builds trust and performance.
readinessChecks: I know the purpose of the feedback.
I can describe the facts without emotions.
I can propose a next step together.

quiz.question: What types of feedback do you know?
quiz.explanation: All listed items are types of feedback.

quiz.question: In what cases is feedback in the form of mentoring used?
options: If you need to develop an employee's skills
If you need to point out an employee's mistake
If you need to praise an employee
quiz.explanation: Mentoring feedback is used to develop skills.

quiz.question: Select the steps of the "6 Steps" scenario.
quiz.explanation: The 6 steps are: request permission, facts, consequences, pause/question, search for a solution, checkpoint.

quiz.question: Does an employee have the right to give feedback to a manager?
options: Yes, if the manager asks for it

quiz.question: Choose the correct question to ask for feedback.
options: Is everything going well in my work?
Tell me, what did I do well in the project, and what do I need to improve?
quiz.explanation: The best question is specific and invites actionable feedback.

screens.title: Feedback fundamentals
screens.subtitle: Why feedback matters and when to use it.
captions: Define the goal of the conversation.

screens.title: The 6-step feedback script
screens.subtitle: A simple structure for tough conversations.
